items.title: Enable Global Accelerate by Default for Worker Uploads in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update enables Tencent COS Global Accelerate by default for all workers uploading to the ap-beijing bucket, addressing issues with slow and timed-out uploads. Key changes include modifications to environment settings across multiple workers to ensure the use of accelerated uploads. This enhancement is expected to improve upload performance significantly for cross-region traffic.

items.title: Enhance COS Uploads with Global Accelerate by Default in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the PlatformPublisher to default COS uploads to the global accelerate endpoint, improving upload efficiency for non-Beijing deployments. Key changes include the addition of configuration options in `app/setting.py` and adjustments in `app/utils/upload.py` to utilize the accelerate endpoint when applicable. This enhancement aims to reduce latency and avoid public internet traversal during uploads.

items.title: Enhance COS Uploads with Global Acceleration in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update switches Wisdom's COS uploads to use the global accelerate endpoint by default, improving upload stability for non-Beijing regions. Key changes include the addition of configuration options in `config.py` and adjustments in the client creation logic in `cdn.py`. This enhancement ensures that uploads bypass the public internet, reducing latency and potential instability.

items.title: Boost file uploads with COS acceleration in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the file upload process by implementing the COS accelerate endpoint, significantly reducing upload latency. Key changes include a new configuration for COS settings, a singleton client for connection reuse, and improved error handling to provide structured logs. These adjustments are expected to enhance user experience by minimizing upload failures and improving performance.
